member.office_address: 2242 Rayburn House Office Building Washington DC 20515-2008

form_analysis.form_header_text: FY27 Programmatic and Language Appropriations Request Form (Not Community Project Funding)
form_analysis.form_instructions_text: Please use this form to submit programmatic and language appropriations requests for Fiscal Year (FY) 2027 to the Office of Congressman Jamie Raskin (MD-08). Please note this is NOT our the Community Project Funding (CPF) application. Please refer to our website for information about the CPF application process. Please complete and submit one form per request. If you submit more than one request, please rank the priority of each request in the appropriate section. To the extent possible, please provide detailed information regarding the location of your request in the subcommittee bill or report, down to the activity/account level (if applicable). Please note: completion of this form does not ensure its inclusion of your requests in the relevant appropriations bill/report. Thank you very much for your engagement in the appropriations process and for submitting your requests to our office.

sections.description: Information about the person submitting the request.

fields.label: Your Full Name (name of the person filling out this form)
Title
Email
Phone Number (please be sure to provide a number that you regularly answer or frequently check the voicemail for during business hours).

sections.description: Information about the organization or entity requesting funding.

fields.label: Requesting Entity
Full Address of Requesting Entity
Type of Requesting Entity

sections.description: General details about the appropriations request.

fields.label: Please select the appropriate subcommittee.
options: Labor, Health and Human Services, Education
National Security, Department of State, and Related Programs
fields.rationale: NASA Science Mission Directorate funding is under the jurisdiction of the House Appropriations Subcommittee on Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies.

fields.label: Agency/Department (e.g. Commerce Department)
fields.rationale: The funding request is for the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA).

fields.label: Account (e.g. Census Bureau)
fields.rationale: The account requested is the Science Mission Directorate (SMD).

fields.label: Please list all Members of the House and Senate who are receiving this request from you.
fields.draft_value:
* Reps.
* Don Bacon (R-NE) and Judy Chu (D-CA) are leading an existing multi-member House letter in support of this request.
* Request also being submitted to additional House offices.
fields.rationale: Request is being submitted to multiple offices; Bacon/Chu lead the House letter per reference values.

fields.label: If you are submitting more than one programmatic and/or language request to our office for FY 2027, please RANK this submission in terms of priority (for example, if this request is your organization's top priority among multiple programmatic or language requests you are submitting to our office, please write "1" below).  If you are only submitting one programmatic and/or language request to our office, please write "N/A" below.
fields.rationale: Priority ranking is a user-specific determination that depends on the submitter's full list of requests to the Member's office.

fields.label: Request Type
fields.rationale: The request is for programmatic funding ($9 billion) for the Science Mission Directorate, which is categorized as 'Programmatic' or 'Program Funding' rather than report or bill language.

sections.description: Details for requests involving specific funding levels for programs.

fields.label: PROGRAMMATIC REQUEST: Provide a clear, one-sentence description of the request.
fields.draft_value: * This request would fund NASA's Science Mission Directorate at $9 billion to ensure continued American leadership in space science and exploration.
fields.rationale: Directly uses the $9 billion funding ask provided in the reference values.

fields.label: PROGRAMMATIC REQUEST: Please state your requested funding amount using numeric digits (e.g., $5,000,000).
fields.rationale: This reflects the specific funding ask for NASA's Science Mission Directorate provided in the reference values.

fields.label: PROGRAMMATIC REQUEST: Please provide the funding level included in the President's FY 2027 Budget Request, using numeric digits (e.g. $5,000,000), if available at the time of your submission.
fields.rationale: As stated in the reference values, the President's Budget Request for FY2027 has not yet been released.

fields.label: PROGRAMMATIC REQUEST: Please provide the FY 2026 enacted funding level, if available at the time of your submission.
fields.rationale: This value is provided as the pre-filled and authoritative FY2026 enacted amount for SMD.

fields.label: PROGRAMMATIC REQUEST:Please provide a brief justification for this request.
fields.draft_value:
* Sustain U.S. preeminence in space science to counter China's rapid expansion in lunar, Mars, and deep-space exploration.
* Restore workforce stability for thousands of contractors and 4,000+ civil servants following major budget volatility in FY2026.
* Implement peer-reviewed National Academies Decadal Survey priorities that provide a nonpartisan roadmap for transformative discoveries.
* Deliver high ROI, with every $1 invested in NASA returning approximately $3 to the economy while inspiring the next STEM generation.
fields.rationale: Synthesizes advocacy talking points regarding international competition, workforce protection, scientific consensus, and economic impact.

fields.label: PROGRAMMATIC REQUEST: Does this programmatic request have a direct connection to MD-08?
fields.rationale: NASA Science has direct economic impact in MD-08, with $21,741,164 in recent obligations to district-based entities like Fcn, Inc. ($2.45M), BAE Systems ($544k), and Adnet Systems ($1.03M).

fields.label: PROGRAMMATIC REQUEST: If applicable, describe the MD-08 connection or impact with as much specificity as possible.
fields.draft_value:
* Over $21.7 million in NASA Science obligations reached MD-08 institutions between FY2023 and FY2025.
* Supports Bethesda-based Adnet Systems' critical research for lunar/Mars exploration and global aerosol monitoring.
* Funds BAE Systems in Rockville for cryocooler development used in high-energy astrophysics missions.
* Drives local innovation through contracts with Fcn, Inc. ($2.4M) and Aurora Engineering LLC ($411K) for technical infrastructure and data discovery.
fields.rationale: Uses specific NASA spending data for MD-8, citing cumulative award totals and project descriptions for Adnet Systems, BAE Systems, Fcn, Inc., and Aurora Engineering.

sections.description: Details for requests involving specific bill or report language.

fields.label: LANGUAGE REQUEST: Select the type of request.
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic funding request; language request sections do not apply.

fields.label: LANGUAGE REQUEST: Agency/Office/Program Title.
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic funding request; the reference values indicate 'N/A' for report or bill language.

fields.label: LANGUAGE REQUEST: Provide a clear, one-sentence description of the request.
fields.rationale: The request is categorized as programmatic; language request fields are not applicable.

fields.label: LANGUAGE REQUEST: Provide the precise language requested to be included in bill or report.
fields.rationale: The request is categorized as programmatic; language request fields are not applicable.

fields.label: LANGUAGE REQUEST: Has this language ever been included in a subcommittee bill/report? If yes, please specify the bill/report, including the page number (e.g. FY2025 CJS report, page 45).
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic funding request; the reference values indicate 'N/A' for report or bill language.

fields.label: LANGUAGE REQUEST: Please provide a brief justification for this request.
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic funding request; the reference values indicate 'N/A' for report or bill language.

fields.label: LANGUAGE REQUEST: Does the language request have a direct connection to MD-08?
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic funding request; language request sections do not apply.

fields.label: LANGUAGE REQUEST: Please describe the MD-08 connection or impact with as much specificity as possible.
fields.rationale: The request is categorized as programmatic; language request fields are not applicable.

top_contracts.description: This delivery order is for red hat licenses and support renewal per the attached quote # pawb02242025larc.1 dated 03/25/2025. The period of coverage is 03/16/2025 through date of award. The period of performance is date of award through 03/15/2026.
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Renewal of essential computing licenses and technical support.

top_contracts.recipient_name: Bae Systems Technology Solutions & Services Inc.
top_contracts.description: Advanced telescope for high-energy astrophysics (ATHENA) cryocooler demonstration model study
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Demonstrating a cryocooler model for high-energy astrophysics.

top_grants.generated_award_summary: Developing an accessible portal for scientific data discovery.

top_grants.description: Execute a balanced science program based on discipline-specific guidance from the national academies of sciences  engineering  and medicine  administration priorities  and direction from congress.   Participate as a key partner and enabler in the agency S exploration initiative  focusing on scientific research of  on  and from the moon  lunar orbit  Mars  and beyond.   Advance discovery in emerging fields by identifying and exploiting cross disciplinary opportunities between traditional science disciplines   develop a directorate-wide  target-user focused approach to applied programs  including Earth science applications  space weather  planetary defense  and space situational awareness.
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Supporting strategic science for lunar, Mars exploration and applied research.

top_grants.description: 23-sageiii23-0017  the role of sage iii/ISS and other global space-based aerosol measurements in advancing and sustaining glossac
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Advancing global aerosol science using ISS-based SAGE III measurements.

top_grants.description: 21-smdss21-0022  oceanography magazine special issue on ocean worlds across our solar system
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Supporting publication of research on solar system ocean worlds.

top_contract_recipients.name: Bae Systems Technology Solutions & Services Inc.
